title: Network Protocol — Client Communication
description: Create a GameProtocol class for encoding and decoding messages as newline-delimited JSON over TCP. Create a GameClient class with connect(), send_command(), receive_response(), and disconnect() methods. Handle message framing with newline delimiters.
test_code:
protocol = GameProtocol()
msg = {'command': 'go', 'args': 'north'}
encoded = protocol.encode(msg)
assert isinstance(encoded, bytes), f'encode should return bytes, got {type(encoded).__name__}'
assert encoded.endswith(b'\n'), 'Encoded message should end with newline'
decoded = protocol.decode(encoded)
assert isinstance(decoded, dict), f'decode should return dict, got {type(decoded).__name__}'
assert decoded.get('command') == 'go', f"decoded command should be 'go', got '{decoded.get('command')}'"
assert decoded.get('args') == 'north', f"decoded args should be 'north', got '{decoded.get('args')}'"
client = GameClient()
assert hasattr(client, 'connect'), 'GameClient must have connect method'
assert callable(client.connect), 'connect must be callable'
assert hasattr(client, 'send_command'), 'GameClient must have send_command method'
assert callable(client.send_command), 'send_command must be callable'
assert hasattr(client, 'receive_response'), 'GameClient must have receive_response method'
assert callable(client.receive_response), 'receive_response must be callable'
assert hasattr(client, 'disconnect'), 'GameClient must have disconnect method'
assert callable(client.disconnect), 'disconnect must be callable'
complex_msg = {'type': 'chat', 'player': 'Hero', 'text': 'Hello world!'}
rt = protocol.decode(protocol.encode(complex_msg))
assert rt == complex_msg, f'Round-trip failed: {rt} != {complex_msg}'
acceptance_criteria: GameProtocol.encode() converts dict to JSON bytes ending with newline
GameProtocol.decode() converts JSON bytes back to dict
GameClient has connect(), send_command(), receive_response(), disconnect()
hints: decode: strip the newline, then json.loads(data.strip().decode('utf-8'))
disconnect: close socket and set _connected = False
